headline: Canadian defined benefit pension plans' funded positions decreased in Q1, reaching 111.4 percent: Aon
summary: Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, announced today that the aggregate funded ratio for Canadian pension plans in the S&P/TSX Composite Index decreased to 111.4 percent compared to 112.6 percent at the end of last quarter, according to the Aon Pension Risk Tracker. At the same date last year, it was 105.5 percent.

headline: Reassessing Aon (AON) After Share Price Pullback And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: If you are looking at Aon and wondering whether the current price really reflects its underlying value, the next sections will help you put a clear number on that question. Aon closed at US$322.78, with returns of a 1.3% decline over 7 days, a 3.8% decline over 30 days, a 6.2% decline year to date, an 18.4% decline over 1 year, 3.7% over 3 years and 43.3% over 5 years. This gives you a mix of recent weakness and longer term gains to think about. Recent news around Aon has focused on its...

headline: Aon Scales AI Compensation Data to Support Faster HR Decisions
summary: AON enhances its compensation database with AI-driven roles and real-time tools, helping firms benchmark pay faster amid surging demand for AI talent.

raw.headline: Aon Scales AI Compensation Data to Support Faster HR Decisions
raw.summary: AON enhances its compensation database with AI-driven roles and real-time tools, helping firms benchmark pay faster amid surging demand for AI talent.

headline: How Investors May Respond To Aon (AON) Expanding AI-Focused Compensation Analytics Capabilities
summary: Aon plc recently enhanced its Radford McLagan Compensation Database, adding AI-specific job families, AI-enabled job matching, API-based data submission, and real-time labor market insights to help HR teams benchmark emerging AI roles more accurately. By deepening its coverage of AI talent and compensation, Aon is positioning its human capital analytics platform as a critical tool for employers competing in a rapidly evolving labor market for specialized AI skills. We’ll now examine how...
